title: Don't You See Ores?
description: Adds a glowing outline to the ores and shows which items ores drop.
body:
This resource pack adds some glowing outlines to vanilla ores and shows which items the ores drop.  

And the glow does not affect other blocks in the game.  

It works with most of other resource packs, and you need OptiFine as the dependency.  

Resource packs that support other versions are making.  

There are currently no plans to make a higher version (versions after 1.14) of this resource pack. I recommend you try [Subtly Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/subtly-glowing-ores) and [Items on Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/items-on-ores).  

Resource packs with lower game versions (versions before 1.9) may not take effect, it is recommended to use a higher version.
